class.name: GFGridOccupancy
class.description: GFGridOccupancy: 网格占用与预约数据结构。 适合格子移动、战棋、推箱子和解谜类玩法在 System 中跟踪运行时占用。 它不负责路径查找、碰撞或胜负规则。

member.name: cell_occupied
member.description: 接收者占用格子时发出。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: cell_released
member.description: 接收者释放格子时发出。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: cell_reserved
member.description: 接收者预约格子时发出。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: reservation_released
member.description: 接收者释放预约时发出。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: grid_size
member.description: 网格尺寸。小于等于 0 的维度会让所有格子视为越界。

member.name: max_occupants_per_cell
member.description: 单格允许的最大占用数量。

member.name: configure
member.signature: func configure(p_grid_size: Vector2i, p_max_occupants_per_cell: int = 1) -> void:
member.description: 设置网格参数并清空占用。

tags.tag: p_max_occupants_per_cell: 单格最大占用数量。

member.name: is_in_bounds
member.description: 检查格子是否在边界内。

member.name: can_occupy
member.signature: func can_occupy(receiver: Variant, cell: Vector2i) -> bool:
member.description: 检查接收者是否可以占用格子。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: occupy
member.signature: func occupy(receiver: Variant, cell: Vector2i) -> bool:
member.description: 占用格子。接收者若已占用其他格子，会先释放旧格子。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: release
member.description: 释放接收者当前占用。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: release_cell
member.description: 释放指定格子的所有占用。

member.name: reserve_cell
member.signature: func reserve_cell(receiver: Variant, cell: Vector2i) -> bool:
member.description: 预约格子，防止其他接收者抢占。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: confirm_reservation
member.description: 将接收者预约确认成占用。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: release_reservation
member.description: 释放接收者预约。

tags.tag: receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: is_cell_occupied
member.description: 检查格子是否有占用。

member.name: is_cell_reserved
member.description: 检查格子是否被预约。

member.name: get_cell_occupants
member.description: 获取格子中的所有接收者。

tags.tag: return: Array receiver values restored from occupancy records.

member.name: get_cell_occupant
member.description: 获取格子中的第一个接收者。

tags.tag: 接收者；不存在时返回 null。
return: Variant receiver value restored from the occupancy record.

member.name: get_receiver_cell
member.description: 获取接收者当前占用格。

tags.tag: 格子坐标；未占用时返回 Vector2i(-1, -1)。
receiver: Variant receiver identity stored by value or weak Object reference.

member.name: prune_invalid_receivers
member.description: 清理已释放 Object 接收者。

member.name: clear
member.description: 清空占用和预约。
